## ComplexClientEvent

Log a named event with an arbitrary JSON payload.

- Endpoint Type: **Request** -> **Response**
- Source: **User**
- Target: **Server**
- Required Scopes: `tachyon.lobby`

### Request

<details>
<summary>JSONSchema</summary>

```json
{
    "title": "TelemetryComplexClientEventRequest",
    "tachyon": {
        "source": "user",
        "target": "server",
        "scopes": ["tachyon.lobby"]
    },
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
        "type": { "const": "request" },
        "messageId": { "type": "string" },
        "commandId": { "const": "telemetry/complexClientEvent" },
        "data": {
            "title": "TelemetryComplexClientEventRequestData",
            "type": "object",
            "properties": {
                "eventName": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 128 },
                "eventData": {
                    "description": "Arbitrary JSON payload, max 4096 bytes serialized.",
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": {}
                },
                "anonHash": {
                    "description": "Unique install hash for unauthenticated users.",
                    "type": "string"
                }
            },
            "required": ["eventName", "eventData"]
        }
    },
    "required": ["type", "messageId", "commandId", "data"]
}

```
</details>

<details>
<summary>Example</summary>

```json
{
    "type": "request",
    "messageId": "id Lorem aliquip dolore consectetur",
    "commandId": "telemetry/complexClientEvent",
    "data": {
        "eventName": "qui magna",
        "eventData": {
            "veniam_f": "culpa minim sit"
        },
        "anonHash": "reprehenderit"
    }
}
```
</details>

```json
                    "type": "string",
```

## UploadInfolog

Upload a gzip-compressed, base64-encoded log file.

- Endpoint Type: **Request** -> **Response**
- Source: **User**
- Target: **Server**
- Required Scopes: `tachyon.lobby`

### Request

<details>
<summary>JSONSchema</summary>

```json
{
    "title": "TelemetryUploadInfologRequest",
    "tachyon": {
        "source": "user",
        "target": "server",
        "scopes": ["tachyon.lobby"]
    },
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
        "type": { "const": "request" },
        "messageId": { "type": "string" },
        "commandId": { "const": "telemetry/uploadInfolog" },
        "data": {
            "title": "TelemetryUploadInfologRequestData",
            "type": "object",
            "properties": {
                "logType": {
                    "description": "Type/category of the infolog, e.g. 'crash', 'replay-error'.",
                    "type": "string",
                    "maxLength": 64
                },
                "anonHash": {
                    "description": "Unique install hash (used for both authed and anon users).",
                    "type": "string"
                },
                "metadata": {
                    "description": "Arbitrary metadata key-value pairs.",
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": {}
                },
                "contents": {
                    "description": "Base64-encoded, gzip-compressed log contents.",
                    "type": "string"
                }
            },
            "required": ["logType", "anonHash", "contents"]
        }
    },
    "required": ["type", "messageId", "commandId", "data"]
}

```
</details>

<details>
<summary>Example</summary>

```json
{
    "type": "request",
    "messageId": "culpa in esse ut",
    "commandId": "telemetry/uploadInfolog",
    "data": {
        "logType": "ad voluptate",
        "anonHash": "proident magna culpa nulla in",
        "metadata": {
            "aliqua77": 83477103.71017456,
            "eiusmod_6": -10195386.409759521
        },
        "contents": "commodo qui"
    }
}
```
</details>

#### TypeScript Definition
```ts
export interface TelemetryUploadInfologRequest {
    type: "request";
    messageId: string;
    commandId: "telemetry/uploadInfolog";
    data: TelemetryUploadInfologRequestData;
}
export interface TelemetryUploadInfologRequestData {
    logType: string;
    anonHash: string;
    metadata?: {};
    contents: string;
}
```
### Response

<details>
<summary>JSONSchema</summary>

```json

    "title": "TelemetryUploadInfologResponse",
    "tachyon": {
        "source": "server",
        "target": "user",
        "scopes": ["tachyon.lobby"]
    },
    "anyOf": [
        {
            "title": "TelemetryUploadInfologOkResponse",
            "type": "object",
            "properties": {
                "type": { "const": "response" },

                "data": {
                    "title": "TelemetryUploadInfologOkResponseData",
                    "type": "object",

                    "required": ["infoLogId"]
                }
            },
            "required": ["type", "messageId", "commandId", "status", "data"]
        },
        {
```
